title: Fx_Force, Fy_Force, Fz_Force Status
description: This returns data on the resultant force.
notes: Use this property to confirm the force data for the specified axis in the force coordinate system specified by CoordinateSystem.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Control

Force Trigger
 Fy_Force, Fz_Force Status

Tx_Force, Ty_Force, Tz_Force Status
examples:
Function Test_Fx_Force Real rVar FSet FCS1.Position, 0, 0, 100 FSet FCS1.Orientation, FG_TOOL FSet FM1.ForceSensor, 1 FSet FM1.CoordinateSystem, FCS1 FGet FM1.Fx_Force, rVar Print rVar
Fend
